sourceSummary.oneLine: SGS Korea test report for BRASS material C3604 M410 covering RoHS-related heavy metals, PBBs/PBDEs, and phthalates.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports material compliance review by documenting sample identification, test methods, and measured substance results for the submitted brass sample.
keyPoints: Product Name is listed as BRASS and Materials as C3604 M410.
Issued Date is 2018.07.17 and Test Report No. is F690101/LF-CTSAYAA18-38759.
Cadmium result is 4.99 mg/kg and lead result is 32100 mg/kg.
Mercury and hexavalent chromium are reported as N.D.
PBBs, PBDEs, and four listed phthalates are reported as N.D.

entities.name: DAECHANG CO.,LTD.
entities.evidence: The following sample(s) was/were submitted and identified by/on behalf of the client as:- DAECHANG CO.,LTD.

entities.name: SGS Korea Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Jeff Jang / Chemical Lab Mgr SGS Korea Co., Ltd.

concepts.name: RoHS testing
concepts.evidence: Testing Flow Chart for RoHS:Cd/Pb/Hg/Cr6+ /PBBs&PBDEs Testing

concepts.name: Heavy metals
concepts.evidence: Heavy Metals Test Items Unit Test Method MDL Results

concepts.name: Phthalates
concepts.evidence: Phthalates Test Items Unit Test Method MDL Results

evidence.evidenceText: Issued Date : 2018. 07. 17 Test Report No. F690101/LF-CTSAYAA18-38759

evidence.claim: The submitted product name is BRASS.
The item or part number is 18-04-17635-1.
The material is identified as C3604 M410.

evidence.evidenceText: Cadmium (Cd) mg/kg 4.99 0.5 With reference to IEC 62321-5:2013
Lead (Pb) mg/kg 32100 5 With reference to IEC 62321-5:2013
Mercury (Hg) mg/kg N.D. 2 With reference to IEC 62321-4:2013

evidence.claim: PBBs and PBDEs testing used IEC 62321-6:2015 by GC-MS.
evidence.evidenceText: With reference to IEC 62321-6:2015 (Determination of PBBs and PBDEs by GC-MS)

evidence.claim: The listed phthalates DEHP, DBP, BBP, and DIBP were not detected.
evidence.evidenceText: Di-(2-ethylhexyl) phthalate (DEHP) N.D. mg/kg; Di-butyl phthalate (DBP) N.D. mg/kg; Benzyl butyl phthalate (BBP) N.D. mg/kg; Di-isobutyl phthalate (DIBP) N.D. mg/kg

evidence.claim: N.D. means not detected below the method detection limit.
Unless otherwise stated, the test results refer only to the samples.
evidence.evidenceText: Unless otherwise stated the results shown in this test report refer only to the sample(s).

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is explicitly identified; SGS Korea Co., Ltd. is the issuing testing company, not a regulator.
The source metadata productSignal HAD/A/F 1417-1717 is not present in the source text and was not used as a document product model.
Test Period text appears inconsistent or OCR-ordered as '2018. 07. 17 to 2018. 07. 11'.
No explicit RoHS pass/fail compliance conclusion or regulatory limit table is stated in the extracted text.
